case_title: THE FLOOR STORE VS. BORAH KIM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2020 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-22-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF THE FLOOR STORE IS PRESENT AND ASK FOR A CONTINUANCE DUE TO MEDICAL REASONS. SC-109 NOT SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT BORAH KIM IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. PARTIES AGREE TO A CONTINUANCE. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2020 - CONTINUED TO MAY-19-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KIM, BORAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT THE FLOOR STORE SEE ATTACHMENT MC-025 #1 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
